title: The Chas. E. Phipps ransomware incident

extortion.description: The Chas. E. Phipps - the company was founded in 1921, and currently employs 67 employees. The company supplies concrete accessories, concrete repair materials, sealants, coatings and various building materials to contractors. The Chas E Phipps corporate office is located in 4560 Willow Pkwy, Cleveland, Ohio, 44125, United States.
